Data Module¶

The data module handles dataset loading, preprocessing, and splitting.

Data handling utilities for 5D interpolator

class data.DataHandler[source]¶

Bases: object

Handler for loading and preprocessing 5D datasets

load_dataset(filepath: str) → Tuple[ndarray, ndarray][source]¶

Load dataset from pickle file

preprocess_and_split(train_ratio=0.7, val_ratio=0.1)[source]¶

Split data into train/val/test sets (70/10/20 or 3500/500/1000 for 5000 samples). Validation set is used for early stopping.

Returns:

(X_train, y_train), (X_val, y_val), (X_test, y_test)

DataHandler Class¶

class data.DataHandler[source]¶

Handler for loading and preprocessing 5D datasets

__init__()[source]¶
load_dataset(filepath: str) → Tuple[ndarray, ndarray][source]¶

Load dataset from pickle file

preprocess_and_split(train_ratio=0.7, val_ratio=0.1)[source]¶

Split data into train/val/test sets (70/10/20 or 3500/500/1000 for 5000 samples). Validation set is used for early stopping.

Returns:

(X_train, y_train), (X_val, y_val), (X_test, y_test)

Methods¶

load_dataset(filepath)¶

Load a .pkl dataset file.

Parameters:

  • filepath (str): Path to .pkl file

Example:

handler = DataHandler()
handler.load_dataset("coursework_dataset.pkl")

preprocess_and_split(train_ratio=0.7, val_ratio=0.1, test_ratio=0.2)¶

Split data into train/validation/test sets.

Parameters:

  • train_ratio (float): Training set proportion (default: 0.7)

  • val_ratio (float): Validation set proportion (default: 0.1)

  • test_ratio (float): Test set proportion (default: 0.2)

Returns:

  • Tuple of ((X_train, y_train), (X_val, y_val), (X_test, y_test))

Example:

(X_train, y_train), (X_val, y_val), (X_test, y_test) = handler.preprocess_and_split()
print(f"Training samples: {len(X_train)}")  # 3500 for 5000 total

5D Interpolator

Neural network interpolator for 5D data
